questions.question: Explain the biological inspiration behind artificial neural networks.
expectedPoints: Biological neurons structure: dendrites, cell body, axon, synapses
Comparison between biological and artificial neurons

questions.question: Describe the learning process in neural networks, including forward propagation, loss calculation, and backpropagation.
expectedPoints: Forward propagation: input processing through layers
Role of learning rate in weight updates
Iterative nature of the training process
